name: jylhis-rust
description: Rust implementation contract plus the Leptos 0.8 UI contract.

interface.longDescription: Rust work — typed boundaries and newtypes, exhaustive enums, error discipline (n0-error), deterministic testing via injected host context, channel-first concurrency; plus the Leptos 0.8 fine-grained-reactivity and SSR/hydrate UI contract.
